rationale: The pair is not an obvious incidental mention: the cited paper focuses on channel control mechanisms (explicit contracts, relational norms, TSIs) and governance consequences across relationship phases, while the citing paper centers on closely related governance constructs (contract design, monitoring, enforcement, compliance/opportunism) in franchise channels. Given this strong construct/domain overlap and the confirmed DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.37.2.227.18735), it is plausibly a foundational/theory source and should be reviewed in full.
